pull_request.title: Require Python >= 3.10 and support Python 3.14
pull_request.body:
## What

Require Python >= 3.10 and support Python 3.14

## Why

Python 3.9 is End-of-Life and it's already not supported anymore by many libraries.

-          - "3.9"

           - "3.11"
           - "3.12"
           - "3.13"
+          - "3.14"

       - name: Check and lint python packages
